ideation: This sequence will show the robot preparing for a bath. The animation will start with the robot's arms relaxed at its sides. Then, the robot will raise both arms, as if reaching for bath products. Finally, the robot will lower its arms, as if settling into the bath.  The movement will be slow and deliberate to convey a sense of relaxation and preparation.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready for a bath
both arms lift slowly, reaching for supplies
arms lower gently, settling into the water
arms rest at sides, submerged in calm
